overall.description: Stationary nighttime footage from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showing a wet multi-lane city street illuminated by neon billboards and streetlights. Futuristic vehicles drive past the fixed camera position on rain-slicked asphalt between towering buildings adorned with holographic advertisements.

Futuristic vehicles including a red sports car and white sedan drive past the camera from left to right, while towering buildings frame the background.

segments.scene_description: The final segment maintains the stationary view of the neon-lit cyberpunk street. A silver sedan and imposing black armored truck pass by on the wet asphalt, with the holographic billboards and streetlights continuing to illuminate the scene consistently.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary perspective of a rain-slicked cyberpunk thoroughfare where a steady stream of futuristic traffic passes under the glow of neon advertisements. It begins with a red sports car and a white sedan gliding across the wet asphalt, which vividly reflects the surrounding billboards and streetlights. As the traffic flow continues, the scene shifts to feature a distinctive green car and a dark SUV passing through the frame while the atmospheric lighting remains constant. The view finally concludes as a silver sedan and an imposing black armored truck drive by, with the towering holographic displays continuing to illuminate the urban canyon.
